title: An Adventure in Arabic
description:
An Adventure in Arabic is an Adventure/Survival RPG game set in the wilderness of a parallel universe where learning the basics of Arabic language can get you special powers that can turn you into a hero who can bring a deserted ruined village and its inhabitants back to the village and to normal life.

Chapter One (this game) starts with our hero venturing into a parallel world where a special language can give him added powers in order to survive. Story leads him to a Librarian who teaches him the Arabic Alphabet by sending him on special missions to fetch Arabic tablets spread through out the map. From there each tablet is crafted to a tool used for resource gathering like chopping trees, or mining, and weapons used for hunting animals, together with various sets of armour sets to fully customize our hero from head to toe, both in looks and abilities.

The game doesn't end with the story; Once all the tablets are fetched and crafted players can focus on enjoying the beautiful nature, pick flowers to craft them into medical potions, gather and store food, or hunt wild animals for resources. The deserted village offers several workshops to craft the items gathered from around the map; With a crafting workbench, a pottery wheel, a furnace, a windmill, a mortar for grinding seeds and grains, and a cauldron to cook the ground flowers into potions, and fuel from rotten plants for torches and lanterns, and more.

Feature rich and full of activities, the game has something to offer for all ages. Nice surprises will find our survival hero (and you) being challenged along a very exciting path of discovery.
description_short: An Adventure in Arabic is a series of games that teaches Arabic Language. Chapter One, introduces Arabic Alphabet. Learn the various shapes and pronunciation of each letter while enjoying playing an Adventure RPG. The game has something to offer for all ages, feature rich and full of activities.
